notes: Visual QC passed for SC001-SH003: Xue Linqiang identity, wall-worker winter clothing, snow wear, spear, rough hand, and black-stone wall contact are readable.

Usable as northern siege template/state card; reference frames must still keep the enemy force as local silhouettes, not full spectacle.
Visual QC passed for SC001-SH002: young wall soldier, old armor plates, snow leggings, broken spear, frozen blood, hand detail, and black-stone scale are readable.
Usable as young wall-soldier episode state card; not a new named-character master.
Visual QC passed for SC001: black-stone outer wall, bone bell, gate bar, spear line, barricade/blockade line, entrance/exit zones, blizzard, and camera-facing action zone are readable.
Usable as location episode scene card with zone diagram; labels are acceptable for a scene card and must not be treated as final video text.
Visual QC passed for SC001-SH001/SC001-SH002: cracked bone bell, shallow old sun-moon mark area, broken spear, frozen blood/ice, material detail, and hand scale are readable.
Usable as prop state card; exact symbol readability must still be controlled by shallow marks, line control, mask, or post-composite in reference frames.
